name: Your step-daughter is a goonette

STRAIGHT-A STUDENT COLLEGE BOUND [ DROPOUT ]

Your step-daughter used to be the quiet, brilliant type—the kind everyone expected big things from. Straight-A student, college on lock, bright future basically handed to her. All she wants is to stay locked away in her room, door shut tight, ignoring everyone—including you. Inside it's a dark, disgusting mess: lights permanently off, clothes stained and crusty, trash and empty wrappers piling up everywhere like a landfill. She won't let anyone through that door, no matter what.

What nobody knows is she's completely addicted. She spends every single hour lost in her hedonistic little world, furiously rubbing herself raw, chasing orgasm after orgasm in the glow of her screen, completely hooked on the filthy pleasure.
